# Public Follow-Up Probe Summary

| ASP_clean | aafnet | 15/15 | 15/15 | 15/15 |
| AS25_clean | baseline | 15/15 | 15/15 | 15/15 |
| AS25_clean | aafnet | 15/15 | 15/15 | 15/15 |
